description: §22.9 E-META-007 — a `?{}` SQL context inside a RUNTIME `^{}` meta block. The block has no compile-time API (only `meta.emit`), so it classifies runtime; a `?{}` SQL context is valid in a `^{}` block only when the block is compile-time evaluated (§22.9), so a `?{}` in a runtime block fires E-META-007. Incidental W-SQL-ROW-UNTYPED (info) ignored by superset matching.
